== Notes for [[Item:Q115971|Q115971]] ==

Guillaume, comte de Fézenzac

b. circa 895

Father García Sánchez "le Courbe"1,2 b. circa 870, d. 924

Mother Aminiana (?)1 b. circa 865

Guillaume, comte de Fézenzac was born circa 895. He was the son of García Sánchez "le Courbe" and Aminiana (?).1,2

Family

Child

Gersinde de Fézenzac+ b. c 925

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 289-37.

[S467] GdRdF, online http://jeanjacques.villemag.free.fr/

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count

#Générale##Générale#Profession : premier Comte héréditaire de Fezensac
Attesté en 926

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
